title: rubus × mutabiliformis
intro: Rubus × mutabiliformis, also known as the black raspberry, is a hybrid of the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis), resulting in a plant with unique properties. The medicinal properties of Rubus × mutabiliformis include its high antioxidant content, anti-inflammatory properties, and potential anti-cancer effects. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × mutabiliformis include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving cognitive function, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Rubus × mutabiliformis can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including jams, jellies, teas, and capsules, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
